name: Struxa Vision
author: Struxa
description: Light SaaS marketing theme with warm off-white canvas, orange accents, two-tier header, hero illustration, and trust bar. Built for Struxa CMS storefront pages, content types, and menus.

topbar_phone.label: Top bar phone or support label

hero_primary_url.label: Hero primary button URL (leave empty for /register)

hero_highlights.label: Hero highlight chips (pipe-separated, max 3, e.g. Open source|Twig themes|Blueprints)

trust_headline.label: Trust bar headline
trust_headline.default: Built for teams who ship structured content on Struxa.

github_repo_url.label: GitHub repo URL (showcase under trust bar)

github_showcase_lead.label: GitHub showcase description
github_showcase_lead.default: Struxa CMS is open source — Slim 4, Twig, plugins, and themes you can clone, extend, and deploy.

blog_news_lead.label: Blog/news block description
blog_news_lead.default: Latest articles and updates from the team.

blog_news_limit.label: Blog posts to show on homepage

blog_archive_title.label: Blog index page title (empty = content type name)

blog_archive_lead.label: Blog index page description
blog_archive_lead.default: Updates, tutorials, and editorial notes from the Struxa team.

features_enabled.label: Show features block on homepage (1 or 0)

features_headline.label: Features headline
features_headline.default: Tailored solutions for teams who ship on Struxa.

features_lead.label: Features description
features_lead.default: Structured content, an editor-friendly admin, and themes you own — without wrestling plugins or rebuilding from scratch every launch.
